name: @efro/shopify-app
description: EFRO Shopify App — OAuth, Product Sync, GDPR, Admin UI

scripts.test:product-sync-pagination: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.readFileSync('server.js','utf8');const a=s.indexOf('async function syncProducts');const b=s.indexOf('app.get',a);const fn=s.slice(a,b>0?b:a+2600);const m={hasSyncProducts:a>=0,startsWithMaxRestLimit:fn.includes('products.json?limit=250'),usesWhileUrl:fn.includes('while (url)')||fn.includes('while(url)'),readsLinkHeader:fn.includes('headers.get(\"Link\")')||fn.includes(\"headers.get('Link')\"),parsesRelNext:fn.includes('rel=\\\"next\\\"')||fn.includes(\"rel='next'\"),advancesUrlFromNextMatch:fn.includes('url = nextMatch ? nextMatch[1] : null'),accumulatesAllProducts:fn.includes('allProducts = allProducts.concat(data.products || [])'),postsAllProducts:fn.includes('products: allProducts'),hasPageCap:fn.includes('SHOPIFY_PRODUCT_SYNC_MAX_PAGES'),has429Retry:s.includes('res.status === 429'),throwsShopifyHttpError:s.includes('Shopify products page failed'),throwsBrainSyncError:fn.includes('Brain Shopify sync failed'),returnsPageAndProductCount:fn.includes('page_count: pageCount')&&fn.includes('product_count: allProducts.length')};console.log('[shopify-product-sync-pagination]',JSON.stringify(m,null,2));for(const [k,v] of Object.entries(m)){if(!v){console.error('FAIL',k);process.exit(1)}}"
scripts.test:runtime-boot: node -e "const {spawn}=require('child_process');const env={...process.env,PORT:'18082',SHOPIFY_APP_URL:'https://app.avatarsalespro.com',SHOPIFY_API_KEY:'dummy',SHOPIFY_API_SECRET:'dummy',SUPABASE_URL:'https://dummy.supabase.co',SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY:'dummy',BRAIN_API_URL:'https://efro-brain.vercel.app',WIDGET_URL:'https://widget.avatarsalespro.com'};const child=spawn(process.execPath,['server.js'],{env});let out='';let done=false;const finish=(ok,msg)=>{if(done)return;done=true;child.kill('SIGTERM');const m={ok,started:/EFRO Shopify Server läuft auf Port 18082/.test(out),hasApiKey:/API Key: ✅/.test(out),hasBrain:/Brain API: https:\/\/efro-brain\.vercel\.app/.test(out),hasWidget:/Widget URL: https:\/\/widget\.avatarsalespro\.com/.test(out)};console.log('[shopify-runtime-boot]',JSON.stringify(m,null,2));if(!ok||!m.started||!m.hasApiKey||!m.hasBrain||!m.hasWidget){console.error(msg||out);process.exit(1)}};child.stdout.on('data',d=>{out+=d.toString();if(out.includes('EFRO Shopify Server läuft auf Port 18082'))setTimeout(()=>finish(true),250)});child.stderr.on('data',d=>{out+=d.toString()});child.on('exit',code=>{if(!done)finish(false,'server exited before ready with code '+code+'\n'+out)});setTimeout(()=>finish(false,'server boot timeout\n'+out),5000);"
